haikus.haiku:
Sour tang on lips,
Lemon drops and sweet tartness,
Joyful pucker smiles.
Happy #NationalSourCandyDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Whispers of the breeze,
Crickets chirp in soft chorus,
Nature's song surrounds.
Happy #WorldListeningDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunrise on the hill,
Joyful voices share sweet cake,
Hearts unite with love.
#HappyBirthdayNelsonMandela from @ClamBakeSanta

content:
